refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the X component of the pixel width in units of coordinate reference system.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the X component of the pixel width in units of coordinate reference system. Refer to World File for more details.
Changed: 2.0.0. In WKTRaster versions this was called ST_PixelSizeX.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT rid, ST_ScaleX(rast) As rastpixwidth FROM dummy_rast;
rid | rastpixwidth -----+-------------- 1 | 2 2 | 0.05
